visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a wide shot of a white two-story building with a balcony, featuring a sign that reads 'haha baby HAMU CAFE'. A group of young adults stands at the entrance. A woman in a black mesh top over a grey sports bra and dark leggings walks confidently toward the camera, her expression focused and energetic. (2) The editing shifts to a series of rapid jump cuts and close-ups. Group members are seen playfully carrying each other or struggling in a chaotic, high-energy manner. Facial expressions are exaggerated with wide smiles, laughter, and mock-aggression. Dynamic yellow and white variety-show style text overlays appear around the characters. (3) The camera returns to a medium shot of the woman in the mesh top. She stands centrally, gesturing with her hands while speaking directly to the viewer. Behind her, the rest of the group is gathered, nodding or smiling. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a clear day. (4) More chaotic clips follow, showing the group members lifting one woman horizontally and running toward the cafe entrance while she laughs. The background is a mix of the cafe's white wall and the street floor. (5) The entire group gathers for a final shot, looking at the camera with excited, high-arousal expressions. They wave their hands and move dynamically as the camera zooms in slightly on the main speaker.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: haha baby HAMU CAFE. (2) [Variety]: 你太過分了. (3) [Subtitle]: hahababy雙11活動. (4) [Subtitle]: 今天最後一天. (5) [Subtitle]: 贈品都要被人搶光了. (6) [Variety]: 你還不結帳. (7) [Subtitle]: 一年一次的最殺優惠. (8) [Subtitle]: 錯過等明年啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in mesh top, roughly 8 other friends/staff members in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a black long-sleeved mesh top, a grey and white sports bra, dark blue leggings, and white sneakers with high socks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern white two-story building with a clean, minimalist design, labeled 'haha baby HAMU CAFE'. It has a small gated entrance and a second-floor balcony with glass doors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music kicks in immediately with a strong, driving beat. A female voice speaks with very high arousal and an excited tone. (2) A series of 'whoosh' and 'pop' sound effects punctuate visual jump cuts. Background crowd noise—specifically laughter and collective shouting—is mixed at a high level. (3) The main female vocal delivers a promotional message with rapid speech and bright, clear articulation. (4) A loud, collective shout from the group peaks in volume, followed by a final rhythmic musical stinger and fading laughter.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-energy promotional advertisement for the brand 'hahababy' during the Double 11 shopping festival. It uses a comedic, variety-show style 'hook' featuring group chaos and physical humor to grab attention, followed by a clear direct-to-camera announcement of the sale's final day to create a sense of urgency and scarcity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: On-screen text mentions Double 11 event, free gifts, and discounts for the brand hahababy, which matches the cafe name in the background.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media native editing with heavy text overlays and high-arousal audio to maximize engagement for a short-form promotional campaign.
